title: Quasi-Local Collapse Dichotomy Conditional Frontier

data_class.name: AdmissibleEinsteinMatterData
fields: matter field Phi satisfying the Einstein-matter equations in the maximal Cauchy development

conditional_statements.name: collapse_implies_trapped_surface
conditional_statements.statement: CosmicCensorship and HoopConjecture imply QL_CollapseGate(R) implies existence of a closed future trapped surface S subset D_plus(R).

conditional_statements.name: no_collapse_implies_no_visible_naked_singularity
conditional_statements.statement: CosmicCensorship implies not QL_CollapseGate(R) implies no future null-incomplete singular point in D_plus(R) visible from future null infinity.

restricted_next_targets: spherical symmetry via Misner-Sharp mass threshold
conditional closure under explicit Cosmic Censorship axiom
boundary: Cosmic Censorship remains an open conjectural assumption.
Hoop Conjecture remains an open conjectural assumption.
No unrestricted nonspherical collapse exclusion is proved.
No unrestricted UniversalBoundaryCompactness theorem is proved.
No Chronos-RR, H4.1/FGL, P vs NP, or Clay-problem closure is claimed.
